title: RML Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: RML Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at RML Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Consultant Physician to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About RML Hospital:
RML Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital!
